title: I Wish + Past — Regret and Longing
description: I WISH followed by a past tense expresses regret about the present or past.
summary_pt_br: I WISH + past = arrependimento do presente. I WISH + past perfect = arrependimento do passado.

scenes.chapter: I Wish + Past — Regret and Longing
scenes.subtitle_en: I WISH followed by a past tense expresses regret about the present or past.
scenes.subtitle_pt: I WISH + past = arrependimento do presente. I WISH + past perfect = arrependimento do passado.

scenes.text_en: I WISH followed by a past tense expresses regret about the present or past. Today's focus: i wish + past — regret and longing. I wish I spoke Italian fluently.
scenes.text_pt: I WISH + past = arrependimento do presente. I WISH + past perfect = arrependimento do passado. Foco de hoje: i wish + past — regret and longing. Queria falar italiano fluente.

scenes.title: I Wish + Past — Regret and Longing
scenes.body_en: I WISH + past simple = regret about NOW. 'I wish I KNEW French.' I WISH + past perfect = regret about the PAST. 'I wish I HAD STUDIED harder.'
scenes.body_pt: I WISH + past = arrependimento do presente. I WISH + past perfect = arrependimento do passado.

examples.en: I wish I spoke Italian fluently.
She wishes she had studied abroad when she was younger.
examples.pt: Ela queria ter estudado fora quando era jovem.

examples.en: We wish we lived closer to the ocean.
examples.pt: Queríamos morar mais perto do mar.

scenes.title: Key vocabulary — I Wish + Past — Regret and Longing

exercise.question: Complete: "I wish I spoke Italian ___."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "I wish I spoke Italian fluently."

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
She wishes she had studied abroad when she was younger.
exercise.explanation: The correct sentence is: "She wishes she had studied abroad when she was younger."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Ela queria ter estudado fora quando era jovem.

exercise.explanation: Five key terms from the lesson. Match each English word to its Portuguese meaning.

scenes.title: I Wish + Past — Regret and Longing — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre i wish + past — regret and longing. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: If you could change one thing about your life, what would it be?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I wish I had learned English when I was young.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Why didn't you learn it back then?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I wish I had said yes to that exchange program.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Is there something you wish were different today?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I wish I lived closer to my grandchildren.
turns.pt_hint: Queria morar mais perto dos netos.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: You could still move, couldn't you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I wish I had the energy to pack and travel.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: It's never too late to try, you know.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: I wish I believed that more often.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Start small. One word, one letter, one call.

scenes.title: The letters she never sent
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, detalhes e sua opinião. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Describe what Dona Lúcia regrets and what she longs for now. Use at least two I WISH sentences.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Resumo curto com quem falou, o que disseram e sua opinião.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Dona Lúcia opened an old wooden box that she hadn't touched for many years.

paragraphs.speaker: Lúcia
paragraphs.en: I wish I had sent these letters when I had the chance.

paragraphs.speaker: Bia
paragraphs.en: Why didn't you send them, grandma?

paragraphs.speaker: Lúcia
paragraphs.en: I wish I were braver. I was afraid of what he would answer.

paragraphs.speaker: Lúcia
paragraphs.en: Now I wish I lived in a time when letters traveled across the ocean.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Some regrets fade over time — others stay quietly, like old letters in a wooden box.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "I Wish + Past — Regret and Longing". I WISH followed by a past tense expresses regret about the present or past. I wish I spoke Italian fluently. She wishes she had studied abroad when she was younger. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: Prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "I Wish + Past — Regret and Longing". I liked it because it was clear and useful. See you next time!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule from last year
I Wish + Past — Regret and Longing
check.explanation: She says: "I Wish + Past — Regret and Longing".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "I Wish + Past — Regret and Longing".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para continuar praticando. Salve os links e volte sempre.
